113 M1D M1D_STAGE_4_ULCER 31d(M1d)Ulcers - Stage 4 CHAR 1 A count of the number of stage 4 ulcers, regardless of cause, on any part of the body. Stage 4 is defined as a full thickness of skin and subcutaneous tissue is lost, exposing muscle or bone.
114 M2A M2A_PRES_ULCER 32(M2a)Pressure Ulcer CHAR 1 A determination of the highest stage for pressure ulcers that were present
